capstone.label: Design Course
capstone.notes: One major design experience from the approved ELENG/EECS design list.

nodes.label: COMPSCI 61A
nodes.title: Structure and Interpretation of Computer Programs
nodes.description: Introduction to programming and computer science. Abstraction, recursion, interpreters, and functional programming in Python.

nodes.label: EECS 16A
nodes.title: Designing Information Devices and Systems I
nodes.description: Linear algebra, circuits, and information processing foundations for EECS. Introduces sensing, actuation, and optimization.

nodes.label: EECS 16B
nodes.title: Designing Information Devices and Systems II
nodes.description: Continuation of 16A: circuits, signals, control, and machine learning basics for EECS majors.

nodes.label: COMPSCI 61C
nodes.title: Great Ideas of Computer Architecture
nodes.description: Machine structures, assembly, pipelining, memory hierarchy, and parallelism.

nodes.label: MATH 54
nodes.title: Linear Algebra and Differential Equations
nodes.description: Matrices, vector spaces, eigenvalues, and ODEs supporting EECS theory courses.

nodes.label: ELENG 120
nodes.title: Signals and Systems
nodes.description: Continuous and discrete-time signals, Fourier analysis, and LTI systems.

nodes.label: ELENG 121
nodes.title: Introduction to Digital Communications
nodes.description: Modulation, channel models, and communication system design fundamentals.

nodes.label: ELENG 105
nodes.title: Microelectronic Devices and Circuits
nodes.description: Semiconductor devices, MOSFET operation, and analog circuit design.

nodes.label: ELENG 117
nodes.title: Electromagnetic Fields and Waves
nodes.description: Maxwell equations, wave propagation, transmission lines, and antennas.

nodes.label: COMPSCI 162
nodes.title: Operating Systems and System Programming
nodes.description: Processes, virtual memory, file systems, and concurrent programming.

nodes.label: COMPSCI 170
nodes.title: Efficient Algorithms and Intractable Problems
nodes.description: Graph algorithms, dynamic programming, NP-completeness, and algorithm design.

nodes.label: ELENG 140
nodes.title: Linear Integrated Circuits
nodes.description: Analog IC design, op-amps, feedback, and layout considerations.

nodes.label: Design Course
nodes.title: ECE Major Design Experience
nodes.description: Senior design course from the approved ELENG/EECS list integrating breadth coursework into a capstone project.

nodes.label: ENGIN 125
nodes.title: Ethics, Engineering, and Society
nodes.description: Professional ethics, social responsibility, and case studies in engineering decision-making.

nodes.label: Software Engineer
nodes.title: Software Engineer
nodes.description: Build scalable systems, applications, and infrastructure at tech companies.

nodes.label: Hardware Engineer
nodes.title: Hardware / IC Engineer
nodes.description: Design boards, ASICs, and embedded hardware for consumer and industrial products.

nodes.label: ML Engineer
nodes.title: ML Engineer
nodes.description: Deploy machine learning models and build data-intensive intelligent systems.

nodes.label: Systems Engineer
nodes.title: Systems / Embedded Engineer
nodes.description: Integrate hardware and software for robotics, communications, and IoT platforms.
